name: expand-image
description: Bria Expand expands images beyond their borders in high quality. Resizing the image by generating new pixels to expand to the desired aspect ratio. Trained exclusively on licensed data for safe and risk-free commercial use

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for expansion. Either aspect_ratio or canvas_size with original_image_size/location must be provided. Can be a predefined string like '1:1', '16:9' etc. or a custom float between 0.5 and 3.0
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

canvas_size.description: Desired output canvas dimensions [width, height]. Default [1000, 1000]. Max 5000x5000 pixels.
canvas_size.title: Canvas Size

original_image_location.description: Position of original image in canvas [x, y]
original_image_location.title: Original Image Location

original_image_size.description: Size of original image in canvas [width, height]
original_image_size.title: Original Image Size

preserve_alpha.description: Preserve alpha channel in output. When true, maintains original transparency. When false, output is fully opaque.
preserve_alpha.title: Preserve Alpha

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed
